title: Dirty Lens
description: A mod that adds various overlays to make the cam look dirty and have scratches
body:
# Dirty Lens

This mod adds four new overlays in HD resolution to enhance Minecraft horror experience.
It also adds the command /lens to select between the four overlays or disable the overlay.

![pic1](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/u/0/drive-viewer/AEYmBYS3dcyA8fCwn04byZjzc6_jJrdxNStGcX4OZWmV-sLU3SlE17HV8ARYChQVADrjUbxEuDjBR_fW-8iHhk6GbgkpsCc3-g=w1920-h991)
![pic2](https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/u/0/drive-viewer/AEYmBYRO8o9ruOMj-LpGAI5kErs8LCwUt2QUHYUvYouPZQacvzHUNhKvK0DZB_Qugys4jbhSGgEHLB7ceYs-HP4pHO-vMG1BYQ=w1920-h991)
